calendar.matters:
PETITION RE SUBSTITUTED JUDGMENT TRUST
Off Calendar Nov-25-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kevin Urbatsch for Herb Thomas.

The Court addressed the petition. Mr. Urbatsch argued in support of the petition stating that there is $9,000.00 and a modest annuity, that because the amount being funded is under $20,000.00 the bond and accountings can be waived, and that his client is willing to take $62.50 in fees per month. At the conclusion of argument, the Court approved the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy McConico. (Not Reported)
